Blytz Ventures creates and scales innovative solutions across technology and beyond — driving impact from Southeast Asia to the world.

Explore Our Ventures Partner With Us

About Blytz Ventures

We exist to drive innovation, market speed, and build impactful companies. Our startup studio model creates, funds, and scales subsidiaries that shape the future.

Speed & Agility

Fast execution cycles that bring ideas to market quickly

Cross-Industry Innovation

Where technology meets diverse sectors for breakthrough solutions

Scalable Impact

Targeting high-growth, high-impact markets globally

Founded 2024
Active Projects: 4
Future Pipeline: Expanding

Our Ventures

Discover our portfolio of innovative subsidiaries driving change across technology, entertainment, and digital services.

Tech Platform

Blytz Live

Fastest Live Auction Experience in Southeast Asia

Revolutionary live commerce platform combining speed, urgency, and gamified auction experiences for the Southeast Asian market.

Explore Blytz Live
Digital Services

Blytz Digital

Full-Stack Digital Solutions & Web Development

End-to-end digital transformation services, from web development to brand strategy, empowering businesses to thrive online.

Explore Blytz Digital
Media & Entertainment

Blytz Media

Content Creation & Digital Entertainment

Producing engaging digital content and entertainment experiences that connect with audiences across Southeast Asia.

Explore Blytz Media
R&D / Innovation

Blytz Labs

Experimental Tech & Emerging Solutions

Our innovation sandbox — exploring AI, blockchain, and emerging technologies to identify the next big opportunity.

Explore Blytz Labs

The Blytz Ventures Approach

Our startup studio model creates, funds, and scales subsidiaries through a proven framework that transforms innovative ideas into market-leading companies.
